_note: STRUCTURAL DEMONSTRATION ONLY. AUGMANITAI is a terminology DATASET, not an AI system and not a trained model. This C2PA manifest is a structural demonstration of how a downstream operator might attach provenance metadata to a dataset artifact. It does NOT assert ISO certification, EU AI Act conformity, or any numeric quality metrics. Descriptive linguistic research, not normative (§1). Longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11). ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified (§16). Restricted applications per §20. See DISCLAIMER.md in the repository root.

actions.description: Manual terminology curation by the author. No ML model was trained; no generative or inference pipeline was used to produce the compendium.
Published under CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 (data) and Apache-2.0 (code).

c2pa.training_mining.mining_restrictions: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0 prohibits commercial use and modifications. §20 of the Ethical Disclaimer prohibits use as a diagnostic, medical, psychological, legal, HR, credit-scoring, insurance, surveillance, or profiling mechanism.

training_data_source_declaration.description: AUGMANITAI is a manually curated terminology dataset, not a machine learning model. No training occurred and no inference runs on this artifact.

terminology_metrics.status: longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11)

restricted_applications.statement: Per §20 of the Ethical Disclaimer, AUGMANITAI terms MUST NOT be used as diagnostic labels, medical/psychological classification, legal categorization, military/intelligence classification, personnel decisions, HR screening, credit scoring, insurance assessment, state surveillance, or profiling mechanisms.

does_not_claim.regulatory_endorsement: None. No affiliation with any regulatory body.

template_usage_instructions.purpose: This manifest template demonstrates the STRUCTURAL fields a downstream operator might use when attaching C2PA provenance to a dataset artifact. It is NOT an assertion of conformity, certification, or regulatory alignment for AUGMANITAI itself.
template_usage_instructions.usage_note: Downstream operators building AI systems must generate their own manifests describing their own systems. Do not copy the AUGMANITAI fields into a system manifest — that would misrepresent the system's provenance.
